name: BBC iPlayer
reliabilityNotes: BBC iPlayer has one of the most aggressive VPN detection systems. It uses device-level detection, requires a UK TV license, and blocks most consumer VPN IP ranges.
troubleshootingTips: Use a VPN server physically located in the UK
Clear browser cache and cookies before connecting
Try a dedicated/static IP address if available
Disable WebRTC in your browser to prevent IP leaks
Ensure your VPN provider offers obfuscated servers
